def: End-to-End Encryption: A system of communication where only the communicating users can read the messages. In our message stream, messages are encrypted using XOR with a pre-shared secret key before saving to the DB.
author: kakaiKing

def: An interactive, adaptive navigation dock at the bottom of the Company Portal that expands and updates based on active modules and user actions.
author: kakaiKing

def: Minimum Viable Product: A version of a product with just enough features to be usable by early customers who can then provide feedback for future product development.
author: kakaiKing

def:
We have standards, when you accomplish them completely in the module youre working on such that you cant do/add anything to achieve the standard
e.g The module has achieved standard limit
author: kakaiKing
